abilities.name: intimidate
abilities.description: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.

effectChanges.description: Does not take effect if acquired after entering battle.

abilities.name: quick-feet
abilities.description: Increases Speed to 1.5× with a major status ailment.

abilities.name: rattled
abilities.description: Raises Speed one stage upon being hit by a dark, ghost, or bug move.
